history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, head-and-shoulders portrait of a young man with dark, styled hair and glasses. He is wearing a blue and white pinstripe button-up shirt, with the top buttons undone, revealing a delicate silver chain necklace. The lighting is dramatic and moody, with soft light illuminating his face from the front and casting shadows on the left side of his face and the background. The background is dark and out of focus, with hints of what appear to be stairs or furniture on the left and a dark curtain on the right. The overall mood is introspective and stylish, with a slightly subdued color palette dominated by blues, grays, and dark tones. The man has clear skin with subtle freckles and is looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. The style of the image is reminiscent of a fashion or portrait photograph with a modern, edgy feel.
